description: Single source of truth for brand identity, product visual rules, and image generation guidance across all InBharat products

global.mission: Building practical, accessible AI tools for India
visual_principles: not sci-fi chaos or robot heads
prohibited_visual_styles: cliche robot heads or AI brain graphics
generic stock photos with fake diverse teams
overuse of Indian flags or tricolor in non-national contexts
fake product UI unless clearly marked conceptual
childish cartoon or doodle style for serious products

inbharat.approved_description_short: India-first AI company building accessible, practical AI tools for Indian users, businesses, and institutions.
inbharat.approved_description_long: InBharat AI provides AI consulting, tools, and automation for Bharat. Services include AI consulting, chatbot development, business automation, custom AI tools, website development, WhatsApp automation, CRM development, and workflow automation — all designed for Indian businesses.
disallowed_claims: No specific user numbers without verification
No government partnerships unless signed
No 'largest' or 'first' claims without proof
No revenue figures unless verified
inbharat.image_prompt_rules: Show real-world Indian contexts. Use clean, modern design. Include subtle InBharat branding. Avoid cliche flags, robots, or sci-fi. Focus on practical AI solving real problems.
content_angles: What India actually needs from AI
Building AI that works for Bharat

platform_notes.linkedin: Thought leadership, founder insights, India AI ecosystem commentary
platform_notes.x: Quick takes on AI in India, product updates, industry reactions
platform_notes.instagram: Visual product stories, carousel explainers, founder journey

sahaayak.approved_description_short: AI-powered conversational assistant designed for Indian users with multilingual support.
sahaayak.approved_description_long: Sahaayak is an AI assistant built for India — supporting Hindi, English, and regional languages to help Indian users get information, complete tasks, and access services in their preferred language.
disallowed_claims: No accuracy percentages without testing evidence
No 'better than ChatGPT' claims without benchmarks
No user adoption numbers without verification
sahaayak.image_prompt_rules: Show conversational interfaces with Hindi/English text. Feature realistic Indian users in everyday contexts. Clean, modern chat UI. Warm, approachable feel.

sahaayak-seva.approved_description_short: AI-powered public service and welfare delivery assistant for Indian government schemes and citizen services.
sahaayak-seva.approved_description_long: Sahaayak Seva helps Indian citizens navigate government schemes, welfare programs, and public services through an AI assistant that speaks their language and understands local government processes.
disallowed_claims: No claims of government adoption without formal agreements
No claims of deployment in specific states without evidence
No citizen count claims without verification
sahaayak-seva.image_prompt_rules: Show citizens accessing services on phones. Include regional language text. Government-trustworthy feel. Include rural and urban contexts equally. No political imagery.

testsprep.approved_description_short: AI-powered test preparation platform for Indian competitive exams and assessments.
testsprep.approved_description_long: TestsPrep uses AI to help Indian students prepare for competitive exams with practice questions aligned to Indian syllabi, adaptive learning paths, and intelligent performance tracking.
disallowed_claims: No 'guaranteed results' or score improvement percentages without data
No ranking claims without independent verification
No comparison to coaching institutes without evidence
testsprep.image_prompt_rules: Show clean, modern study interfaces. Performance dashboards with progress charts. Achievement-oriented visuals. Indian student contexts. No panic imagery or exam stress visuals.

uniassist.approved_description_short: AI-powered university and higher education assistant for Indian students.
uniassist.approved_description_long: UniAssist helps Indian students navigate university admissions, course selection, career planning, and higher education decisions with AI-powered guidance in multiple languages.
disallowed_claims: No admission success rate claims without data
No specific university endorsements without verification
uniassist.image_prompt_rules: Show aspirational but realistic Indian university contexts. Clean guidance interfaces. Career path visualizations. Modern education technology. No childish or generic campus imagery.

phoring.approved_description_long: Phoring brings AI intelligence to communication — smart calling features, conversation insights, and enhanced connectivity designed for Indian users and businesses.
disallowed_claims: No call quality guarantees without testing evidence
No telecom comparison claims without benchmarks
phoring.image_prompt_rules: Show premium communication interfaces. Clean, modern call/messaging UI. Knowledge graph or signal visualizations. Professional contexts. No old phone clipart or generic call center visuals.

codein.approved_description_short: AI-powered coding assistance and education platform designed for Indian developers and students.
codein.approved_description_long: CodeIn provides AI-powered coding assistance, programming education, and developer productivity tools designed for Indian developers and computer science students.
disallowed_claims: No accuracy or quality comparison claims without benchmarks
No adoption metrics without verification
codein.image_prompt_rules: Show premium code editor interfaces with dark mode. Clean terminal aesthetics. Architecture or system diagrams. Developer-focused, technical feel. No toy-like or childish coding imagery.

openclaw.approved_description_short: Multi-channel AI gateway for content creation, approval, and distribution with built-in safety controls.
openclaw.approved_description_long: OpenClaw is an AI-powered autonomous executive operating system that automates content creation, distribution, and intelligence gathering for solo builders and small teams. Runs with near-zero monthly cost through local-first architecture using Ollama, Playwright browser automation, and bash orchestration.
core_capabilities: Autonomous multi-platform posting (LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Discord, email)
64+ content generation skills with disclaimer guardrails
Intelligence layer with 13 specialized scanning lanes
disallowed_claims: No user count claims without GitHub metrics
No 'production-ready for enterprise' without formal testing

visual_style.mood: technical, open source, command-line aesthetic, builder-focused

openclaw.image_prompt_rules: Show pipeline flow diagrams or terminal-style interfaces. Clean architecture visualizations. Open source / builder aesthetic. Technical but accessible. No generic marketing dashboard imagery.

agent-arcade.approved_description_short: Platform for building, testing, and showcasing AI agents in interactive scenarios.
agent-arcade.approved_description_long: Agent Arcade provides a sandbox environment for experimenting with AI agents — build, test, and showcase agent capabilities in interactive scenarios.
disallowed_claims: No adoption or usage metrics without evidence
agent-arcade.image_prompt_rules: Show agent interaction flows or sandbox environments. Technical but approachable. Experimental / playground feel. No generic robot or gaming imagery unless directly relevant.

sahayak-os.approved_description_short: Framework and operating layer for deploying and managing AI assistant instances.
disallowed_claims: No enterprise adoption claims without evidence
cta_options: Part of the InBharat AI ecosystem
sahayak-os.image_prompt_rules: Show system architecture or infrastructure diagrams. Developer-focused, technical. Minimal and clean.

static_post.composition: clean, single focal point, brand colors in accent

carousel_cover.composition: eye-catching, clear value proposition, brand-colored background

infographic.text_overlay: structured data points, charts, flow steps
infographic.composition: organized grid or flow layout, brand colors for data points

ui_mockup.composition: clean device frame, real or realistic UI, no fake data

conceptual_poster.composition: modern abstract with brand color accents, premium feel

product_explainer.composition: flow diagram or feature grid, clean and scannable

workflow_diagram.composition: left-to-right or top-to-bottom flow, brand-colored nodes

founder_message.composition: clean background, prominent text, subtle brand accent
